title: irania umbellata
intro: Irania umbellata, also known as the common or broad-leaved wild parsnip, is a perennial plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues due to its anthelmintic and carminative properties. The health benefits of Irania umbellata include its potential to help manage digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Irania umbellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its roots and leaves can be used to make medicinal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to support overall health and well-being.
